title: DURA PULSE
description: DuraPulse is a purely client-side Minecraft mod that causes your hotbar slots to subtly pulse red whenever a tool or armor piece drops below 10% durability. At a critical 2%, a brief crack sound gives you a final warning before it breaks.
body:
# 📋 Mod Information: What does DuraPulse do?
**DuraPulse** is a **lightweight**, purely client-side Quality-of-Life (QoL) mod designed to save your valuable gear from accidental destruction. Instead of constantly staring at durability bars during intense fights, the mod intuitively alerts you:

**Visual Pulse (Below 10% Durability):** As soon as a tool, weapon, or armor piece in your hotbar drops below 10% durability, its slot will subtly and smoothly pulse red.

**Audio Alert (Below 2% Durability):** 
When things get critical (below 2%), the mod plays a subtle yet distinct "crack" sound once—acting as the ultimate warning to put your item away immediately.


**100% Client-side:**
You can easily add this mod to your personal modpack and use it on any server.
The server doesn't need to have it installed!
